title: Among Us
description: Choose your origin. Master arcane forces or harness advanced technology. In a shattered world filled with ancient dungeons and forgotten realms, only those who embrace their path will survive. Among Us is not just a modpack—it's your destiny.
body:
## 🧭 Among Us – The Ultimate Adventure Modpack

Embark on a journey full of mystery, magic, and technology!  
**Among Us** is an adventure-focused modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 featuring countless dungeons, powerful artifacts, and advanced machines. Perfect for players who crave exploration and variety.

### 🏰 Explore Dangerous Dungeons

Face epic boss fights and hostile creatures from **Bosses of Mass Destruction** and **Mutant Monsters**.  
Travel through mysterious dimensions like **The Bumblezone** and uncover secrets hidden in every biome.

### ✨ Master the Arcane Arts

Harness magical powers and wield wands to dominate your foes.  
Use unique abilities with **Origins** and enjoy an enchanted world enriched by **BetterEnd** and many magical enhancements.

### ⚙️ Embrace Technology

Automate your world and construct powerful contraptions with **Alternate Current** and other tech-based mods.  
Upgrade your gear and tools with **Warden Tools** to survive even the toughest challenges.

### 🌍 A Living World

Experience dynamic seasons with **Fabric Seasons** and rely on **Smarter Farmers** for sustainable village life.  
Recover at safe spots with **Healing Campfire** while planning your next adventure.

### 🎮 Essential Features

- **REI (Roughly Enough Items)** – Easily browse recipes and item uses  
- **MapFrontiers** – Mark your territory and explore with purpose  
- **TalkBubbles** – Enjoy visual communication in multiplayer  
- **Very Many Players** – Performance optimization for large sessions  

### ⚠️ Recommended

- **Install [Fast Portals](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fast-portals/files/4607846) to travel faster**

---

Are you ready for the adventure of a lifetime?  
Download the pack now and uncover the secrets hiding *Among Us*!
